scores.justification: Refinement-spectrum method sound and kernel-checked, but Theorem 4.3 (thm:horn-boundary) attributes a per-valuation boundary to horn_realizable_iff, whose actual Lean statement is the global biconditional; one of five headline contributions (C4) rests on a statement the kernel did not check. Downstream separation chain independently sound.

63 kernel-checked declarations, clean build, verified axiom footprint, 42/42 Appendix cross-references — but the evidence for (C4) as printed is absent (no per-valuation Horn declaration exists), and the 'nine lines' proof-length claim is wrong (six tactic lines).
Contributions enumerated (C1)-(C5) in the introduction, one extractable sentence each; central separation result stated crisply in both abstract and intro.

Button, Moss, Armstrong/Skyrms, Evans-Berger, McKinsey/Horn, Benzmueller each engaged on actual merits with named theorem relationships. Deduction: Spinney 2022 (venue precedent) and Lokhorst 1988 (prior formal reconstruction) sit uncited in refs.bib.

Toolchain pin, axiom footprint, and per-theorem Lean cross-reference table are exemplary; but no resolvable artifact locator (URL/DOI/commit) appears anywhere — the companion citation is @unpublished with a prose note.

Figure legible and print-safe, Appendix table clean booktabs. Deduction: caption claims the tiers are 'refinement-incomparable', overstating Theorem 5.4 (failure of refinement-equivalence); the figure artwork itself carries the correct 'no refinement equivalence' label.

Flow intact, prose disciplined, no broken cross-references. Deduction: 6 overfull hboxes over the 5pt threshold (worst 121.5pt at the §5 colorModel display; 75.3pt Appendix module path; 73.2pt Definition 2.3 area).

All 14 cited keys resolve with complete fields (bibtex 0 errors/warnings). Deductions: Hacker direct quote lacks a page number; TLP 3.42 quotation wording needs verification; three unused bib entries; evans2014 folds the arXiv id into the journal field.
Nine pages with no restatement padding; each section adds a distinct layer; Limitations is genuine hedging; contribution extractable from abstract plus (C1)-(C5) in under 90 seconds.

findings.rationale: Theorem 4.3 states a per-valuation Horn realizability boundary and attributes it to horn_realizable_iff; the Lean theorem is the global biconditional (every assignment realizable iff every clause trivial). No per-valuation Horn declaration exists in the artifact.
findings.suggested_fix: Restate Thm 4.3 to match horn_realizable_iff (and rewrite the contrapositive gloss + intro (C4)), or add the per-valuation lemma to the artifact (mirroring exclusion_realizable_iff) and cite the new declaration.

findings.rationale: 'The kernel-checked proof is nine lines' — the proof body of exclusion_not_horn is 6 tactic lines; no counting convention yields nine.
findings.suggested_fix: Reword to 'six lines' or 'a few lines'.

findings.rationale: Caption says the Horn and exclusion tiers are 'refinement-incomparable'; Theorem 5.4 proves failure of refinement-equivalence, and every exclusion model refines into Horn(S, []) = freeModel, so the tiers are comparable in one direction.
findings.suggested_fix: Align caption with the figure artwork's 'no refinement equivalence' wording.

findings.rationale: The paper's only artifact locator is the prose phrase 'the tractatus repository'; no URL, DOI, or commit hash is given for the machine-checked development.
findings.suggested_fix: Add a resolvable repository URL + commit hash or an archival DOI.

findings.rationale: 6 overfull hboxes over 5pt: worst 121.5pt (colorModel display, §5), 75.3pt (Appendix module path), 73.2pt (Definition 2.3 area).
findings.suggested_fix: Break the display, make the module path breakable, rework the Definition 2.3 line; rebuild to a clean log.

findings.rationale: Hacker direct quotation carries no page number; TLP 3.42 quotation reads 'but' where Pears-McGuinness reads 'nevertheless'.
findings.suggested_fix: Add the Hacker page reference; verify and correct the TLP 3.42 wording against the cited translation.

findings.rationale: Three bib entries defined but never cited; Spinney 2022 (Synthese venue precedent) and Lokhorst 1988 (prior formal reconstruction of the Tractatus ontology) are close enough to merit engagement. [related-work]
findings.suggested_fix: Cite both in §6 (a sentence each) or drop the unused entries; a pub-litsearch re-run would settle placement.
Remove the draft marker for the submission copy.

critical_flags.justification: Theorem 4.3 prints a per-valuation Horn realizability boundary and attributes it to horn_realizable_iff; the actual Lean theorem (proofs/TractatusOntologyHorn.lean, verified this pass) is the global biconditional — every assignment S → Prop is realizable iff every clause is trivial. No declaration proving the printed statement exists in the artifact, yet §1 asserts every result is kernel-checked. Upholds the .2.audit critical flag; downstream separation chain unaffected.

overfull_boxes: 18 overfull box(es) over 5.0pt threshold (6 unique boxes across 3 concatenated pdflatex passes; worst 121.5pt at the §5 colorModel display). Deterministic render-gate failure per pub-review step 4b; payload in _gate.json.
